[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Deevis''' was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].

==Biography==
Deevis, who participated in some of heaviest fighting of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], was present at the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Second Battle of Borleias]], serving under [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. Deevis would also later serve in the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], during which [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was retaken from the Yuuzhan Vong.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
